title: Understanding the experiences of victims of antisocial behaviour
body: "The Victims’ Commissioner, Baroness Newlove, published her report Still living a nightmare: Understanding the experiences of victims of antisocial behaviour,  on 9 September 2024.  The report looked at:   the experiences of victims of persistent antisocial behaviour the provision of support for such victims best practice in supporting victims the barriers victims encounter when reporting and engaging with agencies   The government’s response sets out:   the actions the government will take to meet the Commissioner’s recommendations cross-government work to improve support for victims  "
